title: LR-139
author: Psalm 48 (47):10-11
snippet: Your merciful love, O God, we have received in the midst of your temple. You praise, O God, like your name, reaches the end of the earth; your right hand is hilled with saving justice.

title: Psalm - 14th and 31st Sun of OT
author: Psalm 145: 1-2, 8-9, 10-11, 13-14
snippet: I will praise your name for ever, my king and my God.

title: 14th Sunday of Ordinary Time A
author: Matthew 11:25
snippet: Blessed are you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth; You have revealed to little ones the mysteries of the kingdom.

title: Like the Bread
author: Tom Booth
snippet: Like the bread, we are taken. Like the Christ, we are blessed. On this altar we are broken Giv’n as food that all might live, Giv’n as food that all might live.

title: LR-140
author: Psalm 34 (33):9
snippet: Taste and see that the Lord is good; blessed the man who seeks refuge in him.

title: Bread of Life
author: Bernadette Farrell
snippet: Bread of life, hope of the world, Jesus Christ, our brother: feed us now, give us life, lead us to one another.

title: Prayer of St. Francis
author: Sebastian Temple
snippet: Make me a channel of your peace. Where there is hatred, let me bring your love. Where there is injury, your pardon, Lord, And where there’s doubt, true faith in you.

title: America the Beautiful
author: MATERNA
snippet: O beautiful for spacious skies, For amber waves of grain, For purple mountain majesties Above the fruited plain! America! America! God shed his grace on thee, And crown thy good with brotherhood From sea to shining sea.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
